legal.indexDescription: Review the policies governing MeetYouLive, including safety, privacy, payments, creators, intellectual property and moderation.
legal.registrationNotice: By creating an account you agree to our Terms, Privacy Policy, community rules and payment policies.
legal.onboardingNotice: By continuing you agree to use MeetYouLive under our legal and safety policies.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Terms for matches, chat, calls, video calls, live streams, gifts, coins, creators and moderation.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance and scope
body: By accessing or using MeetYouLive you accept these Terms of Service and the linked policies. If you do not agree, you must not use the platform.
These terms apply to the website, apps, accounts, profiles, matches, chat, calls, video calls, live streams, gifts, coins, subscriptions, creator content and moderation tools.

sections.heading: 2. Eligibility and minors
body: MeetYouLive is intended only for users who meet the minimum legal age in their jurisdiction and never for minors where monetization or safety rules prohibit access. We may request age or identity checks.
Content or conduct involving exploitation, grooming, sexualization, harassment or risk to minors is strictly prohibited and may be reported to authorities.

sections.heading: 3. Social and live features
body: You may use MeetYouLive to discover profiles, match, chat, call, video call, join rooms, watch live streams and send gifts. You must respect consent, privacy and user boundaries.
We do not guarantee matches, creator availability, earnings, audience, continuous connectivity or technical compatibility.

sections.heading: 4. Coins, gifts and creators
body: Coins and virtual gifts are digital items for use inside MeetYouLive. They are not money, deposits, stored value or property rights outside the platform.
Payments may be processed through Stripe, Stripe Connect, Apple, Google or other approved providers. Approved creators monetize under the Creator Policy and Payments & Refund Policy.

sections.heading: 5. Content, moderation and termination
body: You keep rights to your content but grant MeetYouLive the license needed to host, display, moderate and operate it within the service.
We may remove content, restrict features, suspend payouts, suspend accounts or terminate access for violations, fraud, safety risks, copyright issues or legal requirements.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How we collect, use and protect data across profiles, matches, chat, calls, live streams, payments, reports and moderation.

sections.heading: 1. Controller and contact
body: MeetYouLive processes personal data to operate the platform. Contact privacy@meetyoulive.net for privacy requests.

sections.heading: 2. Data we collect
body: We may collect account, profile, age, approximate location, photos, preferences, language, matches, likes, chats, calls, video calls, live streams, gifts, coins, transactions, creator requests, reports and technical signals.
We do not store full payment card numbers when Stripe or another provider processes the payment.

sections.heading: 3. How we use data
body: We use data to create accounts, personalize discovery and matches, enable chat, calls and live streams, process payments, manage coins and gifts, support creators, prevent fraud, moderate content and comply with law.

sections.heading: 4. Image, voice and safety
body: Live streams, calls and video calls may transmit image, voice, messages, gifts and technical metadata. Reported content or related signals may be reviewed for safety and compliance.

sections.heading: 5. Sharing, retention and rights
body: We may share data with infrastructure, payment, streaming, notification, support, moderation, compliance and fraud-prevention providers. We do not sell personal data.
You may request access, correction, deletion, portability or objection by contacting privacy@meetyoulive.net.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable Use Policy
acceptableUse.description: Minimum rules for using MeetYouLive safely, legally and respectfully.

sections.heading: 1. Principles
body: Use MeetYouLive to connect, talk, create and support content legally, safely and with consent. Do not use the platform to harm, deceive, exploit or infringe rights.

sections.heading: 2. Prohibited conduct
body: Harassment, threats, hate, spam, fraud, impersonation, payment manipulation, ban evasion, abusive automation, malware, social engineering and unauthorized access are prohibited.

sections.heading: 3. Prohibited content
body: Illegal content, child safety violations, extreme violence, doxxing, non-consensual intimate content, extortion, terrorism, trafficking, illegal drugs and intellectual property infringement are prohibited.

sections.heading: 4. Chat, calls, live streams and payments
body: Respect consent and privacy in messages, calls, video calls and live streams. Do not pressure users into sharing private data, intimate content, external payments or off-platform contact.
Do not use coins, gifts, refunds, chargebacks or Stripe Connect for fraud, laundering, misleading monetization or ranking manipulation.

sections.heading: 5. Enforcement
body: Violations may result in content removal, feature limits, live stream termination, payout holds, account suspension or reports to providers and authorities.

communityGuidelines.title: Community Guidelines
communityGuidelines.description: Behavior expectations for users, viewers, matches and creators.

sections.heading: 1. Respect and consent
body: Treat every person with respect. Consent must be clear, ongoing and revocable in chat, calls, video calls, live streams, gifts and any interaction.

sections.heading: 2. Dating and match safety
body: Do not share sensitive information too soon, pressure others for meetings, external payments or intimate content, or misrepresent yourself. Report suspicious behavior.

sections.heading: 3. Live rooms and creators
body: Hosts and participants must avoid hate, humiliation, exploitation, illegal activity and unauthorized content. Creators are expected to cooperate with moderation.

sections.heading: 4. Gifts and support
body: Gifts are voluntary. Do not promise romantic, sexual, financial or off-platform outcomes in exchange for coins or gifts.

sections.heading: 5. Reports and consequences
body: Use reporting tools for abuse, harassment, fraud, child safety concerns or prohibited content. False or abusive reports may also be sanctioned.

creatorPolicy.title: Creator Policy
creatorPolicy.description: Rules for approved creators, monetization, gifts, coins, agencies, payouts and Stripe Connect.

sections.heading: 1. Creator approval
body: Creator access is subject to review, age, identity, quality, safety and compliance requirements. We may approve, reject, pause or remove creator status.

sections.heading: 2. Creator responsibilities
body: Creators are responsible for live streams, videos, rooms, profiles, promotions and communications with fans. They must follow community, acceptable use, intellectual property and app store rules.

sections.heading: 3. Monetization
body: Creator earnings may come from gifts, premium content, calls or enabled features. Internal balances are not money until MeetYouLive validates eligibility and processes an allowed payout.

sections.heading: 4. Stripe Connect, agencies and payouts
body: We may use Stripe Connect or other providers for identity, tax and payout compliance. Agency or sub-creator relationships are valid only when active and accepted by the parties in the platform.

sections.heading: 5. Fraud and payout holds
body: Inflating gifts, rankings or earnings with fake accounts, self-payments, coordinated chargebacks, misleading promises or bought traffic is prohibited. Payouts may be held or cancelled during review.

paymentsRefunds.title: Payments & Refund Policy
paymentsRefunds.description: Payments, coins, gifts, subscriptions, Stripe, Stripe Connect, in-app purchases, payouts and refunds.

sections.heading: 1. Payment processing
body: Purchases may be processed by Stripe, Stripe Connect, Apple App Store, Google Play or other approved providers. Prices, taxes, currencies and payment methods may vary by country and device.

sections.heading: 2. Digital items
body: Coins, gifts, Sparks and digital benefits are consumed inside MeetYouLive. They are not money, do not earn interest, are not transferable outside the platform and are generally non-refundable once delivered or used.

sections.heading: 3. Subscriptions and app stores
body: Subscriptions renew under the terms shown at purchase. If you buy through Apple or Google, cancellation and refund handling may be managed by that store.

sections.heading: 4. Refunds and disputes
body: We may consider refunds for duplicate charges, verified technical errors, missing credits or timely reported unauthorized use. Used coins and gifts are not refundable unless required by law.
Chargebacks may lead to temporary suspension of features, coins, gifts, accounts or payouts until the dispute is resolved.

sections.heading: 5. Creator payouts
body: Creator payouts depend on eligible balance, anti-fraud review, identity, tax requirements, platform rules, Stripe Connect and possible holds for disputes, reports or violations.

dmca.title: DMCA / Copyright Policy
dmca.description: Process for reporting copyright, trademark, likeness and intellectual property infringement.

sections.heading: 1. Intellectual property
body: MeetYouLive respects copyright, trademarks, likeness and other intellectual property rights. Users and creators may only post content they own or are authorized to use.

sections.heading: 2. Infringement notices
body: Send claims to copyright@meetyoulive.net with the work identified, the allegedly infringing content or URL, contact details, a good-faith statement, an accuracy statement and a physical or electronic signature.

sections.heading: 3. Takedown and repeat infringement
body: We may remove or limit allegedly infringing content, suspend live streams, restrict repeat infringers and preserve information needed for dispute handling.

sections.heading: 4. Counter-notices
body: If you believe content was removed by mistake, you may send a counter-notice with your details, the content identified, a statement under penalty of perjury and jurisdiction consent where applicable.

sections.heading: 5. Abuse
body: False, abusive or bad-faith claims may lead to platform sanctions and legal consequences.

safetyModeration.title: Safety & Moderation Policy
safetyModeration.description: Reports, review, moderation actions, suspensions, appeals and user protection.

sections.heading: 1. Goal
body: MeetYouLive should be safe for discovery, matches, chat, calls, live streams, creators and gifts. This policy explains how we handle risks and reports.

sections.heading: 2. Reports and signals
body: We may use user reports, technical signals, fraud patterns, provider alerts and internal reviews involving profiles, chats, calls, live streams, gifts, payments or content.

sections.heading: 3. Moderation actions
body: Depending on severity, we may warn, remove content, limit reach, block messages, end live streams, restrict gifts, pause payouts, temporarily suspend or close accounts.

sections.heading: 4. Minors and severe harm
body: Reports involving minors, exploitation, threats, violence, self-harm, extortion, non-consensual intimate content or fraud are prioritized and may be escalated to providers or authorities.

sections.heading: 5. Appeals and transparency
body: You may request review at safety@meetyoulive.net. Some measures remain active during review to protect the community. We may update criteria to meet legal, Stripe, Apple and Google requirements.
